reinitializedFor.goal: Redo the local Diginoces application UI and UX from scratch, one route at a time, using Impeccable guidance and shadcn/ui as the structural component base.
reinitializedFor.scope: Local redesign accepted. Hosted deployment preparation is approved after local review and user approval.
reinitializedFor.rejectedDirection: The previous generic redesign pass is rejected. Do not inherit its visual language, layout rhythm, copy tone, page structure, component habits, or approval status.
notThis: not the previous generic redesign direction
not an active sprint implementation pass
reinitializedFor.behaviorRule: Existing pages are behavior inventory only. Preserve routes, route protection, auth, MFA, Supabase access, permissions, form field names, server actions, API contracts, validation, audit behavior, public-token access, and existing product capability.
reinitializedFor.approvalRule: A route counts only after purpose intake, shadcn component selection, behavior preservation, product-copy review, focused checks, Impeccable detector, local browser verification, and user acceptance.

product.purpose: Secure wedding and event operations for projects, events, guests, imports, RSVPs, invitations, messages, files, partners, commercial controls, seating, check-in, reports, and audit trails.
product.scene: Event operations staff, couples, partners, and event-day crews coordinate sensitive wedding data under time pressure on laptops, tablets, and phones.
product.qualityBar: A user fluent in Linear, Stripe Dashboard, Notion, and Apple system apps should trust the interface and move through the task without pausing at strange components.
antiReferences: AI-looking gradients, glass panels, bokeh blobs, sketch graphics, and ornamental backgrounds

pageFamilies.name: Command Desk
pageFamilies.purpose: Launchpads and overviews with orientation, current state, priority queues, and one safe next action.

pageFamilies.name: Detail Workspace
pageFamilies.purpose: Weddings, events, guests, invitations, messages, files, partners, commercial controls, and reports.

pageFamilies.name: Review Queue
pageFamilies.purpose: Approvals, moderation, import review, preview checks, partner review, and operational exceptions.

pageFamilies.name: Guided Form
pageFamilies.purpose: Creation and setup flows with grouped fields, clear labels, preserved field names, validation guidance, and stable submit/cancel actions.

pageFamilies.name: Public Guest Experience
pageFamilies.purpose: Mobile-first invitation, RSVP, and guest-message pages that are bilingual-ready and free of administrative clutter.

pageFamilies.name: Event-Day Board
pageFamilies.purpose: Seating, maps, check-in, scanning, and live operations with scan contrast, large touch targets, current state, blockers, and one next action.

pageFamilies.name: Evidence Surface
pageFamilies.purpose: Reports, audit history, files, launch readiness, and commercial controls with source context, redaction-aware copy, exports, and trust-building empty states.

typography.family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
rules: no display typography in labels, buttons, forms, or data tables
monospace only for real codes, tokens, identifiers, and technical values

motion.rule: state feedback only; provide reduced-motion handling when animation exists

shadcn.componentRule: Use shadcn components first and read docs before unfamiliar component work.

checklist.rule: Every route pass must be recorded here before moving on or repeating work.
